title: Deploying retail AI to scale personalisation and customer insight
slides: Can retail AI truly understand each customer's intent?
Most personalisation fails because it lacks real-time data.
One chain used AI to predict unplanned purchases overnight.
Stop guessing segments—let models surface hidden demand patterns.
Run a single pilot on last month's sales to start.
thread_text:
1. Can AI read minds?

One retailer predicted unplanned purchases overnight using live data.

2. Real-time is the edge.

Most personalisation fails because it uses yesterday's data, not now.

3. Stop slicing segments.

Instead, let models reveal demand patterns customers haven't expressed.

4. The twist in the night.

That chain's AI caught intent most systems miss—sudden, unplanned buys.

5. Start with one pilot.

Pull last month's sales and run your first test. What do you find?

script: Can retail AI truly understand intent?
One chain predicted unplanned buys overnight.
Stop guessing—let models surface hidden demand.
Run a pilot on last month's sales.

instagram.caption:
A major retail chain used live data to predict unplanned purchases overnight—things customers didn’t even plan to buy 💡

Most personalisation fails because it relies on yesterday's info, not what's happening now. That shift from static segments to real-time signals caught intent most systems miss 🎯

For content creators: your audience's next unspoken need is already in your data—ready to surface.

What hidden buying pattern would you find if you ran your last month's sales through a model tomorrow? 🛒

carousel_slides.hook: Can AI predict what you'll buy tonight?
carousel_slides.description: A retail chain used live data to forecast unplanned purchases overnight, catching intent most systems miss.
Most systems fail because they rely on old data, not real-time signals from the shopper now.
Let models surface hidden demand patterns customers haven't expressed, instead of guessing groups.
The AI caught sudden, unplanned buys that traditional analytics missed entirely in real-time.

carousel_slides.hook: Try one pilot – save this post.
carousel_slides.description: Pull last month's sales data and run your first AI test. Start small today.
